name: Internal mana
description: The caster's own reserve, similar to stamina, breath capacity and nerve pressure combined.

name: Ambient mana
description: Unstable environmental energy near faults, springs, old forests, volcanic stone, battlefields and underground systems.
strategic_use: turns specific places into sacred or military assets

name: Stored mana
description: Held inside rare mineral lenses, treated bone, ritual metals, old engines, sealed vessels or living groves.

name: Borrowed mana
description: Group rituals, blood rites, oath circles, temple choirs, battlefield chants or emergency casting.
